fields.summary: Harden authentication middleware and refresh token handling
fields.description: Backend work to improve token refresh logic, session validation, and failure tracing for expired credentials.

fields.summary: Implement profile settings validation and error messaging
fields.description: Add form validation, backend payload checks, and cleaner error responses for profile update workflows.

fields.summary: Refactor dashboard widgets and fix loading state regressions
fields.description: Refactor frontend dashboard components, resolve UI rendering issues, and tighten loading state behavior.

fields.summary: Improve bulk upload API validation and observability
fields.description: Backend and validation work for bulk upload parsing, edge-case handling, and structured logging.
